reasons: tests pass and implementation is mostly correct
CLI should not load full Kimi session file content into memory

findings.issue: CLI uses read_text() to load full context.jsonl, which can contain conversation content.
findings.required_fix: Stream file line-by-line and extract only _usage counts.

findings.issue: Empty usage records do not include a troubleshooting note.
findings.required_fix: Include a note when no _usage entries are found, unless caller provided notes.

retro_check.reason: recent Round 004 micro retro already captured privacy rule; this is a narrow fix
